title: Subitem Kanban is now in the marketplace!

posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml:
Subitem Kanban is designed to turn your subitems into a visual Kanban board.

You can group your subitems by their status type column in Subitem Kanban.

You can update your subitems and parent items in Subitem Kanban board.

You can customize Subitems cards in Subitem Kanban.

Quickly organize, update, and edit both subitems and parent items directly in the Kanban view, making complex projects easier to manage.

Built by Mikada, a trusted monday partner, Subitem Kanban enhances team collaboration and task prioritization.
It’s an affordable, user-friendly solution to boost your productivity.

posts.author: DBarnett (Derek)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried this app, but had some rather substantial issues. Simply put, while the subitems did appear in a kanban board, I had virtually no control over the presentation of that board. The order of statuses was seemingly random with no means for me to adjust it and visually the overall effect was difficult to engage with, even with my largest monitor offering more screen real estate than your average user. This seems the the start of a very useful app, but it’s distinctly missing features to tailor the experience into optimal usability.

posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your feedback I forwarded your request to our developer team, we will work on them.
